---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Ultimate Dominion
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Manifesto Alignment

Does this feature align with the game's core principles?

- [ ] Makes the world more permanent
- [ ] Makes the world more player-driven
- [ ] Worth coming back to in a year

## Motivation

Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve for players?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how this could work:

- **Affected systems**: (e.g., CombatSystem, ShopSystem, client UI)
- **New MUD tables needed**: (check `mud.config.ts` — the table may already exist)
- **Design doc**: (link to existing doc in `docs/future/` if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they're less ideal.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to other games, or related issues.
